chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. D – 04 of 2020 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For hearing of bail after arrest 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of bail application 05.03.2020 Mr. Yasir Arfat Mahar, Advocate for applicants / accused. Mr. Aftab Ahmed Shar, Additional Prosecutor General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned counsel for the applicants / accused, after arguing the bail application at some length, does not press this bail application, however, states that directions may be issued to the trial Court for deciding the case expeditiously. Learned Additional P.G recorded no objection for issuance of such directions to the trial Court. We firmly, believe that expeditious disposal is the right of every accused. While dismissing this bail application as not pressed, we direct the trial Court to decide the case within two months under intimation to this Court. Trial Court is further directed to submit the progress report of each and every date of hearing through Additional Registrar of this Court. Criminal Bail Application is disposed of in the above terms. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
